summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a hot 1982 show highlighted by standout Mexicali Blues, Peggy‑O, Bird Song and many other gems.
review: The matrix source is praised as crystal‑clear and the best sounding version of this concert, delivering a vivid listening experience. Reviewers rave about the band’s fire, citing Mexicali Blues, Peggy‑O, Bird Song, Estimated Prophet, Stella Blue, Iko Iko and Man Smart as high points throughout both sets.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are highly positive (4‑5 stars) and consistently praise both the musical performance and the matrix recording quality, indicating an overall excellent show with an excellent source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound as very nice, great, and the best they have heard of this show – a clear, well‑balanced matrix mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set openings with Iko Iko and Man Smart are noted as fresh, while the second set delivers a strong flow with Peggy-O, Bird Song and other highlights, keeping energy high throughout.
